orderLines.productDesc: Evian Natural Spring Water, 33.8 oz., 12 Bottles/Pack (EVI10000)

imageAltTexts: Evian Natural Spring Water, 33.8 oz., 12 Bottles/Pack (EVI10000)~#|#~sp66392483_sc7
Evian Natural Spring Water, 33.8 oz., 12 Bottles/Pack (EVI10000)~#|#~sp82921271_sc7
dummyKey.title: Evian Natural Spring Water, 33.8 oz., 12 Bottles/Pack (EVI10000)

paragraph: This personal sized bottle of Evian natural spring water is ideal for instant refreshment anytime, the perfect size to slip in your backpack, bag or purse. Our natural spring water from the French Alps has a balanced mineral composition and naturally occurring electrolytes that give it a distinctive, smooth taste that's refreshing, rehydrating & delicious either cold or at room temperature. Evian's commitment to quality ensures that you enjoy natural hydration with every sip. The recyclable plastic bottles are designed for convenience, making it easy to stay refreshed on the go.
headliner: Experience the pure, refreshing taste of Evian Natural Spring Water.

dummyKey.title: Staples Plastic File Box with Snap Lid, Letter/Legal Size, Clear, 4/Carton (TR57620CT)

paragraph: Eliminate paper clutter in your workstation with these hanging file boxes. The transparent design makes the location of stored files easy, while the rectangle construction supports both horizontal and vertical document placement. A hinged lid snaps on tightly, and built-in rails are compatible with a range of hanging folders. These plastic Staples hanging file boxes lets you stack files and has built-in handles for convenient carrying.
bullets: Hanging file box is an easy way to store files
Compatible with letter- or legal-sized files; built-in rails allow for use with hanging file folders
Comes in clear and made of durable plastic
headliner: Store letter- and legal-sized documents with these clear Staples hanging file boxes.
expandedDescr: With the Staples letter and legal file box, you can take your files with you and know they'll stay safe and dry, even on the wettest, rainiest days. Unlike cardboard file boxes, this file box won't get soft or mushy when it gets damp, so even if you need to store your files in the basement, you'll know your important papers will remain safe. The lid on the Staples letter and legal file box snaps tightly shut to seal out moisture, dust, and other contaminants that could damage important files. It keeps your files safe and secure while also making them portable, so you'll always have your files with you when you need them. The Staples letter and legal file box holds both letter and legal file folders. Simply turn the files in the appropriate direction to fit them by the length or width of the box. The Staples letter and legal file box is made from clear polypropylene, so it's durable enough to stand up to rough handling and other conditions that would destroy a cardboard box. It's also clear, so if you have more than one box, you can easily see what's inside without having to open them.

paragraph: 1" x 3" Fabric Bandages, 16 Per Box
bullets: Ideal for minor cuts, abrasions and puncture wounds
Fabric is designed to stretch and conform to the wounded area
Ventilated to aid in the natural healing process
headliner: Our fabric bandages are ideal for minor cuts, abrasions and puncture wounds.
expandedDescr: The flexible fabric is designed to stretch when you stretch while the strong adhesive still holds the bandage firmly in place. The pliable woven fabric also easily conforms to the wounded area and stays put even when wet. Each bandage is also ventilated to aid in the natural healing process. These are the bandages you will always want to have on hand whether that be in your home, office, or car.

paragraph: Bring fashion and functionality with the 4-tier simple sleek storage shelf that blends in wherever it is placed, whether in the garage or in the closet.  The IRIS USA shelving unit is made with durable resin and can withhold up to 100lbs per shelf with a total weight capacity of 400lbs.  With plenty of space on each shelf, the storage shelf is perfect for storing items whether light or heavy.  The storage shelf can be assembled easily by simply interconnecting the shelves and connecting bars together without any tools.
bullets: 100 lbs. per shelf / 400 lbs. entire unit
headliner: Whether in the garage, or in the home, use the convenient shelving unit to store storage boxes, gardening tools, clothes, books, or use as a plant shelf.

paragraph: Make life easier with the SIMPLEHUMAN Tension Arm Paper Towel Holder that lets you smoothly tear one or multiple sheets at a time with one hand. The weighted base keeps it steady, while the finger loop makes it easy to pick up and move. Built for everyday convenience, it’s designed to work best with SIMPLEHUMAN's high-performance jumbo paper towels—so you get fewer roll changes and a longer-lasting roll every time.
bullets: one at a time: Precision-tuned tension arm allows you to cleanly tear one sheet or multiple sheets with one hand.
steady as you use: Weighted base keeps the towel holder steady and secure in place during use.
grab and go: Finger loop makes it easy to pick up the paper towel holder and move wherever you need it.
headliner: SIMPLEHUMAN Tension Arm Paper Towel Holder offers effortless one-handed tearing and a stable, weighted base for smooth, mess-free use every time.

paragraph: This personal sized bottle of Evian natural spring water is ideal for instant refreshment anytime, the perfect size to slip in your backpack, bag or purse. Our natural spring water from the French Alps has a balanced mineral composition and naturally occurring electrolytes that give it a distinctive, smooth taste that's refreshing, rehydrating & delicious either cold or at room temperature. Evian's commitment to quality ensures that you enjoy natural hydration with every sip. The recyclable plastic bottles are designed for convenience, making it easy to stay refreshed on the go.
headliner: Experience the pure, refreshing taste of Evian Natural Spring Water.

paragraph: With its Ion Core technology you get amazing power in every battery. Plus, they come pre-charged and ready to use. They are guaranteed to last for 10 years* in storage and they will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use. These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times. *or up to 400 recharges, whichever comes first.
bullets: DURACELL AA RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: The Duracell Rechargeable AA battery is designed for use in video game controllers, wireless electronics, baby monitors, and more.
RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times, helping save you money.
LONG LASTING CHARGE: Designed and developed with Ion Core technology. You can get hundreds of cycles out of each Duracell Rechargeable battery.
GUARANTEED FOR 10 YEARS IN STORAGE: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are guaranteed to perform for up to 10 years in storage* in storage and will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use.
#1 TRUSTED BATTERY BRAND: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are available in Double A (AA) and Triple A (AAA) sizes.
headliner: Duracell Rechargeable Pre-Charged NiMH batteries let you charge hundreds of times, helping you save money.
